name: Clocktower at the End of Main Street
text:
{T}: Add {W} or {B}.
Whenever any player rolls one or more dice or flips one or more coins, you may pay {1}. If you do, put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock. The tower keeps time for the whole town, whether the town likes it or not.
{4}, {T}: Look at the Doomsday Clock; you draw cards equal to the number of doom counters on it divided by four, rounded down.
flavorText: It used to ring on the hour. Now it only rings once, at the very end, and it has been clearing its throat for years.

extras.interaction: feeds the clock from the whole table's gambling
